skills.name: test-targeted
skills.description: Run tests matching changed files only (fast, <5s)

skills.name: test-before-complete
skills.description: Comprehensive test coverage check with semantic gap analysis - run before completing any feature

skills.name: test-fix-failures
skills.description: Diagnose and fix failing tests - classifies root cause and offers fixes

skills.name: test-generate
skills.description: Generate comprehensive tests for a specific source file

skills.name: test-coverage-report
skills.description: Live coverage analysis with per-file breakdown and priority recommendations

skills.name: test-api-contract
skills.description: Validate API route changes match Pydantic schemas

skills.name: test-regression-guard
skills.description: Guard against test regressions - warns if test count decreases or tests break

skills.name: quality-check
skills.description: Run black and ruff quality checks after backend code changes

skills.name: type-check
skills.description: Run TypeScript type checks after frontend code changes

skills.name: infra-health
skills.description: Check Docker services and connectivity. Use --pipeline for full RAG smoke test (embedding, retrieval, LLM).

skills.name: rag-architect
skills.description: RAG architecture advisor - evaluates pipeline decisions against best practices. Auto-consulted on RAG file changes; /rag-architect for full audit.

skills.name: rag-quality-gate
skills.description: Validate RAG retrieval quality: intent classification accuracy, multi-video coverage, diversity metrics, and summary availability

skills.name: rag-eval
skills.description: Run retrieval evaluation against golden dataset. Supports --baseline, --compare [NAME], --k N, --tags.

skills.name: ux-audit
skills.description: UX auditor - visual inspection, accessibility, responsive testing, and user journey analysis. Modes: page review (/ux-audit /videos), flow analysis (/ux-audit flow onboarding), or full audit (/ux-audit).

skills.name: co-founder
skills.description: Technical co-founder — validates features against market demand and research trends, picks proven technology, scopes MVPs, and orchestrates other skills for thorough planning.

skills.name: doc-drift-check
skills.description: Detect documentation drift — verifies CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, and .env.example match actual code (service counts, config defaults, skill counts, beat schedule)
